title: [TaCZ/SBW] PlayerRevive gun mod compitability
description: This mod adds compitability for PlayerRevive with TaCZ and SuperbWarfare mods
body:
This mod adds compatibility between PlayerRevive, TaCZ, and SuperbWarfare mods. It ensures that player revival mechanics work correctly when using advanced combat systems from these mods.
In addition, the update fixes several issues with hitboxes, improving accuracy and consistency of damage detection across different player states.
A new mechanic was also added: when a player is downed (after falling or being incapacitated), their weapons are temporarily disabled, preventing any firing until the player is revived.
